summary: THREE_PANEL Cramer's rule in 2D. Left: the original column parallelogram built from v (RED) and w (GREEN) with area det(A)=3. Middle: replace the first column by b (YELLOW) to get a new parallelogram of area 6. Right: the coordinate formula x = det([b w]) / det([v w]) = 6/3 = 2, with the companion y formula shown underneath.
